h1.visual_description: Large, bold, black serif font on a solid red background; typically includes a Roman numeral prefix followed by a period.

visual_matchers.pattern: Large white serif drop cap (approx. 4 lines high)
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Opening of a new chapter or major section

visual_matchers.pattern: White serif body text on solid red background

layout_info.primary_flow: asymmetric two-column (left column reserved for chapter titles, right column for body text)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: none visible; clean bleed-to-edge red background
